sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58978" key="kopragwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοπρ-ᾰγωγός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n58978.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying dung</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γαστήρ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:222" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">222</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κ. ῥιπίς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0433.tlg001:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
